author: yorickdowne
content:
I'm glad to see this discussion. Here are the expiry options I'm aware of by client

Full history: All with exception Ethrex
Post-merge history: All
Post-Prague history: Geth, Nethermind, Reth
Rolling 1-year history: Reth, Erigon, Nethermind, Besu
Minimal history: Reth, Erigon, Besu

What "minimal history" is exactly differs between Reth, Erigon and Besu. And the "rolling 1-year history" is something that is somewhat arbitrary and can be configured on Reth, Erigon, Nethermind and Besu through their parameters.

Having an agreement on what the desired minimum is will help, and would allow me to collapse these options in my tooling: Rolling 1-year is gone, and minimal takes its place.
